name: SENTIENT BRANDS HOLDINGS INC.
business: Sentient Brands Holdings Inc. is a next-generation brand platform focused on acquiring, developing, and commercializing premium and functional consumer packaged goods (CPG) with an emphasis on wellness, sustainability, and emergency preparedness. Its portfolio includes brands like Original New York Seltzer, Arctic Frost, Burlone, and Aqua Emergency, which are sold through subsidiaries AIG-F&B (manufacturing and distribution), Aqua Emergency (emergency water and MREs), and Wyoming Bears (CPG distribution).

exposures.sentence: Sentient Brands is currently a next-generation brand platform focused on the acquisition, development, and commercialization of premium and functional consumer packaged goods (CPG) with an emphasis on wellness, sustainability, and emergency preparedness.

catalysts.event: Change in control of Wyoming Bears, Inc. (WYB) transfer to January 1, 2026
catalysts.sentence: As a result of the effective date extension, change in control of WYB did not transfer until January 1, 2026.
The Reverse Recapitalization was implemented by FINRA on January 2, 2026.

tamClaims.claim: The global functional beverages market was valued at approximately USD 165-185 billion in 2025, projected to expand at a CAGR of 5-8% through the early 2030s, reaching USD 230-315 billion by 2030-2035.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2025, the global functional beverages market was valued at approximately USD 165-185 billion (with estimates ranging from USD 151.7 billion to USD 184 billion across industry sources), reflecting strong demand for innovative formulations including energy drinks, sports and recovery beverages, and electrolyte-enhanced hydration products.

tamClaims.claim: The functional drinks segment in the United States is projected to grow at a CAGR of around 8% from 2025 onward.
tamClaims.sentence: In the United States, a major market for such products, the functional drinks segment demonstrates particularly strong momentum, with projected growth at a CAGR of around 8% from 2025 onward.
